subcodes.first_line: O thou who callest out in the Covenant! With all spirit and fragrance have I hearkened unto that which thou didst address to one of the loved ones of God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من نادی بالمیثاق انی بکل روح و ریحان استمعت ما خاطبت به احدا من احباء الله
subcodes.subjects: @firmness in the Covenant, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @growth of the Cause
